title: VR Swagger
description: Adds some VR Swagger for my VR Gamers
body:
A simple mod that adds VR headsets and contollers

REQUIRES [GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

<details>
<summary>Headsets and Contollers</summary>

  
- Valve Index + Index contollers
- Quest 2 + Contollers
- Quest 3 + Contollers
- Quest 3s + Contollers
- PSVR + Move Contollers
</details>


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>


- Jeryn - [VR Gear Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vr-gear)
- Valve / Steamworks - Valve Index and Contollers and there STL files
- Meta - Quest 2/3/3s and contorllers
- Sony / Playstation - PSVR and PS Move Contollers
</details>

Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/XRgVhZAPgb)


Donate and get early access to my mods on [Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/westmoon05)
